title: Satan and the Woman
writer: Harry Chandlee (titles), Adrian Johnson (adaptation), Mary Lanier Magruder (story "Courage")
actors: Claire Windsor, Cornelius Keefe, Vera Lewis, Thomas Holding
plot: Leone Daingerfield, a ruthless old woman, tries to crush the romance between her heir, Edward Daingerfield, and her granddaughter, Judith, whose blood relationship she refuses to acknowledge.
